subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Beauty of God! I have perused thy eloquent letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه الی جمال الله انی قرأت تحریرک البلیغ
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @The Holy Spirit, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
